mapper.sql: id, student_id, exercise_id, student_answer, is_correct, submit_time, score
mapper.select: SELECT FROM student_exercise WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND exercise_id = #{exerciseId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM student_exercise ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM student_exercise WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_correct = 1
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(is_correct) / COUNT(*), 0) FROM student_exercise WHERE exercise_id = #{exerciseId}
